creator: freebsd@darkain.com
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #11)

At this point, there are a small number of C7 ports still not working on Aarch64, HOWEVER, I think those should be broken out into their own commit instead of holding up this main body of work.

Before merging in these changes, it would be very appreciated if there could be some testing to ensure that i386 and amd64 C7 packages didn't break in this process.

If everything checks out okay, I think this should be good to check in, so we have a basis for Aarch64 Linuxulator distros going forward.
